operating_state: Total revenue increased 8% to $67,307 driven by 6% comparable sales growth and 25 net new warehouses opened since prior year quarter. Comparable sales benefited from 3% increases in both shopping frequency and average ticket, with digitally-enabled comparable sales surging 21%. Core merchandise categories and warehouse ancillary businesses both expanded, led by pharmacy and hearing aids performance.
cost_structure: Gross margin percentage improved 4 basis points to 11.32% despite gasoline price deflation headwinds. Warehouse ancillary businesses contributed 7 basis points of improvement while core merchandise margins remained flat, with LIFO benefit reduction creating 3 basis point headwind. SG&A expenses as percentage of sales increased 1 basis point to 9.60%, with prior-year tax assessment charge offset by improvements in central operating costs.
material_events: Quarterly dividend increased to $1.30 per share from $1.16 prior year, declared October 15 and paid November 14. Company repurchased $210 million of common stock during the quarter at average price of $932.02. Annual membership fee increases implemented September 1, 2024 contributed to 14% membership fee revenue growth.
macro_exposures: Foreign currency translation adjustments created $206 million negative impact on comprehensive income versus $324 million prior year. Government tariff actions across various countries affect merchandise costs with exposure dependent on goods type, rates imposed, and timing, with higher tariffs more likely to adversely impact results based on current sourcing patterns.
forward_outlook: Management projects approximately $6,500 capital expenditures for fiscal 2026, primarily for new and remodeled warehouses, information systems, and distribution facilities. Expansion continues with higher square footage growth rates expected in international markets. Company maintains $1,320 in borrowing capacity under bank credit facilities and $1,752 remaining under share repurchase authorization expiring January 2027.
uncertainty_profile: Multiple class action lawsuits pending including California labor law violations and privacy law violations from website pixel trackers. Federal False Claims Act investigation ongoing regarding prescription medication claims with opioid litigation consolidated in multidistrict proceedings. Warehouse opening plans subject to change upon review of capital expenditure needs and economic environment assessment.
